chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 459 of 2021. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on office objection as flag A. 2.For hearing of main case. 09.02.2022. Mr. Waseem Akhtar Soomro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, A.A.G. ===== Heard arguments. As per comments filed by the District Accounts Officer, Larkana, the issue of recalculation of commuted pension of the petitioner is pending adjudication with the Finance Department as well as Accountant General, Sindh. If it is so, then the petitioner may wait for the decision to be taken by them and then approach this Court for the needful in accordance with law, if any adverse order is passed against him. The instant constitutional petition being premature is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
